exercises.name: Flat DB Bench Press
exercises.note: 60s is the standard now. Controlled lower, drive up. 1-2 RIR on last set.

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.note: Up 5 lb from 135. Pull elbows back, chest stays up, brief pause at the top. Don't let the weight yank you forward.

exercises.name: Incline DB Bench
exercises.note: Push for 12 clean reps on the last set. Elbows at 45 degrees, full range. Hit 12x3 cleanly and you go to 65 lb next session.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.note: Up 5 lb from 120. Pull bar to upper chest, lean back slightly, squeeze lats at bottom. Don't swing.

exercises.name: DB Lateral Raise
exercises.note: Hold at 15s and push for 20 reps — earn the jump to 20 lb with volume, not just weight. Lead with elbows, stop at shoulder height, no momentum.

exercises.name: Arms Superset — Hammer Curl + Rope Pushdown
exercises.detail: Hammer Curl 25 lb × 12 + Rope Pushdown 77 lb × 12 · 3 rounds
exercises.note: Push for 12 on the curls at 25 lb — when 12 feels easy across all 3 rounds, jump to 30 next session. No rest between curl and pushdown. Split rope at bottom, lock elbows in.

exercises.name: Core Circuit
exercises.detail: Dead Bugs x 10/side + Side Plank 30s/side + Pallof Press 20 lb x 10/side · 2 rounds
exercises.note: Controlled and deliberate. Low back flat on dead bugs. Hips don't sag on side plank. Resist rotation on Pallof.

week.note: Flat bench / cable row / lat pulldown focus
Leg press / hip thrust / KB swings
